---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Codeagogo
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / Use Case

A clear description of the problem you are trying to solve or the use case this feature would address.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references that help illustrate the request.
